FOR LINCOLN SCHOLARS

pages.raw_text:
III: A, Miss Ida Mcguire; B, Miss

Lutheran church-Grade w: A,

Turner hall-Mrs. Mary A. Monroe.
principal. Grade VI: Miss Frances
Weiserman. Grade VII: Miss Jennie
Mann. Grade VIII: Miss Gertrude
Weiseman.


The board of education requested
Superintendent Tormey to prepare an
outline of a commcrc;ai course for
the High school, which will be sub
mitted next Monday evening, to en-
brace bookkeeping, typewriting, stem
ography and business methods. The
course will be elective and will be
ready for pupils who prefer to enter
business directly rather than con-
tinue on to college.


The damage to the Lincoln school
by fire is estimated at $21, 400, COW
cred by $4,000 insurance.


Miss Date Rothrock was granted
q years leave of absence. Miss Grace
Grant Of Moscow was elected High
school librarian. F. II. Dewey was
appointed Fields school janitor. j.
A. Meyers transferred TO Holm1j
school, Miss Nell G. Wilson was
elected to the waiting list.
